title: there should totally be an Eva Christmas Carol
display_title: there should totally be an Eva Christmas Carol
wikitext:
[]: there should totally be an Eva Christmas Carol             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Dec 20, 2006 10:04 pm i was watching the version with Patrick Stewart as Scrooge (which is by far the best Christmas Carol of them all...with the best Scrooge) and i got this demented idea in my head...what if those gainax wackos decided to make an eva Christmas Carol for fun Ebeneezer Scrooge = Gendo Jacob Marely = Fuyutski Bob Cratchit = Shinj Mrs. Cratchit = Asuka Tiny Tim = Rei I Fred = Kaji Belle = Yui Fezziwig = Keele Past = Kaworu Present = Misato Future = Unit 01 Donation Collectors = Kensuke and Toji Grave Robbers = Maya, Aoba, Hyuga Fan = Mana

[]:             Quote Post by Auriel » Thu Dec 21, 2006 6:34 am No. Just....NO.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 21, 2006 7:32 am As stupid as the idea is I think it would be amusing

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Thu Dec 21, 2006 1:48 pm I'd like to see the future ghost eating up gendo ^^ It'd be a nice ending ^^

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Thu Dec 21, 2006 1:48 pm Big Panda wrote: I'd like to see the future ghost eating up Scrooge ^^ It'd be a nice ending ^^

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Dec 21, 2006 3:44 pm "God bless us, everyone!"

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Dec 21, 2006 4:04 pm Somewhere out there is a fanfic with this idea. I read about one paragraph of it and stopped because I already deemed it to suck.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Dec 21, 2006 4:36 pm this scares me
